content.full_text:
TO: [ ] JEANNE   [ ] JAY   ( ) DAN
[ ] LYNN   [ ] BARBARA   ( ) JOHN K
[ ] ROGER   [ ] CARLA   ( ) MARY ANN
[ ] HELEN   [ ] OTHER

FROM: Colleen McGee
DATE: 4-1-86

[x] TELEPHONE ADVICE - SEE BELOW
[ ] CORRESPONDENCE ADVICE - SEE ATTACHED DRAFT
(IF YOU HAVE ANY COMMENTS, NOTIFY ADVISOR WITHIN 1 DAY)

FILE LOCATION:

INCLUDE IN ADVICE PACKAGE: YES [ ]   NO [ ]

CALLER Rena
REPRESENTING A-K Associates
PHONE NUMBER: 446-7505

QUESTION: Can both partners of a lobbying firm be designated as the responsible officer of the lobbying firm, so either partner can sign the firm's statements?

ANSWER: Yes. Amend the lobbying firm's registration statement to indicate both partners will be the responsible officer, and have each partner sign the amended registration form.
